brief.audience: Detail-oriented UK shoppers interested in technical apparel specifications

matchedFragments.reason: Partial semantic match; strong keyword overlap; brand: premium-tone; fresh content
Partial semantic match; strong keyword overlap; brand: premium-tone; fresh content

gaps.description: While fragments mention cold-weather garments, none provide the level of technical detail (e.g., tensile strength, wind resistance data) required for a detail-oriented audience.
gaps.suggestedAction: Write a 200-word en-gb product-story fragment covering "fabric performance specifications", applying premium-tone and technical-precision and sustainability-voice.

gaps.description: Fragment frag_001 directly addresses the use of recycled wool insulation but is primarily an editorial piece and may lack depth regarding the material's entire journey or technical origin.
gaps.suggestedAction: Write a 200-word en-gb product-story fragment covering "recycled wool insulation story", applying premium-tone and technical-precision and sustainability-voice.

gaps.description: Fragments frag_02 and frag_005 touch upon sustainable fibers and recycled materials, but they do not offer a comprehensive, singular guide on all possible compositions.
gaps.suggestedAction: Write a 200-word en-gb product-story fragment covering "sustainable material composition", applying premium-tone and technical-precision and sustainability-voice.

gaps.description: While guides exist (frag_003) and care topics like stain removal are covered, the pool lacks a holistic, comprehensive technical manual for all types of apparel longevity.
gaps.suggestedAction: Write a 200-word en-gb care-guide fragment covering "garment care and longevity", applying premium-tone and technical-precision and sustainability-voice.

gaps.description: No top match applies the `technical-precision` brand guideline required by the brief. Some candidates exist but lacked any required brand guideline and were filtered out.
gaps.suggestedAction: Add fragments tagged `technical-precision` (alongside premium-tone, sustainability-voice) for the en-gb corpus so this brand voice is represented in the top matches.

draftOutline.title: Technical Specifications & Sustainable Story: Outerwear for Detail-Oriented Shoppers

sections.heading: The Genesis of Enduring Style
sections.rationale: Establishes the high-quality, intentional foundation of the collection and its commitment to enduring design.

sections.heading: Uncompromising Technical Performance
sections.rationale: Provides the deep-dive data (e.g., tensile strength, barrier properties) required by detail-oriented shoppers lacking in the current content pool.
sections.sourcingHint: Write a 200-word en-gb product-story fragment covering "fabric performance specifications", applying premium-tone and technical-precision and sustainability-voice.

sections.heading: Crafting Warmth: A Sustainable Material Journey
sections.rationale: Introduces and details the use of recycled wool insulation within the collection's higher-level narrative.

sections.heading: Maintaining Integrity: Garment Care and Longevity
sections.rationale: Offers essential guidance on caring for and maintaining the garments, maximizing their lifespan.
